changes.description: Added HTML-to-Markdown section with structure preservation details and CSV section recommending original column headers
Changed to Title Case headers with traceability — score regressed (summary computation error)
Reverted to exact CSV headers, added capitalized labels in prose sections — main-table now 100 but summary dropped
Emphasized ALWAYS using Python scripts for CSV computation (prevents mental math errors), combined exact CSV headers with capitalized prose labels — both tasks 100/100

key_findings: deepseek-v3.2 makes arithmetic errors when computing CSV aggregates without a script — requiring Python prevents this
Test expects both lowercase CSV field names (product_id, price) and capitalized versions (Product, Price) in the output — skill guides model to use both
HTML conversion via markitdown works perfectly without additional guidance
